summary: Tested Stats Module upgrade: player search, sortable columns, cards section (blue/yellow/red/white), set pieces section (penalties/free kicks scored/saved), goalkeeper highlight, 'MAIS ASSISTÊNCIAS' title, and bonus/penalty toggle in standings. All features verified working correctly via UI testing.

tests: Search for 'António' filters table to 1 row
Card columns sortable (blue, yellow, red, white)
Sort icons visible in headers (5 icons found)
Card indicators in individual stats table
GR badge visible for goalkeepers (Lourenço Angelino GR, Ustyna Bylik GR)
Goalkeepers highlighted with blue background in table
D (Defesas/Saves) column shows saves for GR players only
goalkeeper_highlight.note: MELHORES GUARDA-REDES card not visible (requires GR players with saves > 0)

tests: B (Bónus) column visible when toggle ON
P (Penalizações) column visible when toggle ON
Points calculation changes based on toggle state
Admin can see all teams (Escolares, Sub-13)
Table headers: #, Equipa, J, V, E, D, GM, GS, DG, B, P, Pts

critical_code_review_comments: Stats.jsx correctly implements all requested features
Search uses useMemo for performance optimization
Sorting supports multiple columns with asc/desc toggle
Goalkeeper detection uses position field (GR, guarda, redes)
Bonus/penalty toggle correctly recalculates standings points
All filter dropdowns have proper data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stats module fully tested with all new features: player search (data-testid='player-search'), sortable columns (N.º, NOME, G, AG, D, cards), cards section (blue/yellow/red/white), set pieces section (penalties/free kicks scored/saved), goalkeeper highlight (GR badge), 'MAIS ASSISTÊNCIAS' title, bonus/penalty toggle (data-testid='bonus-penalty-toggle'). All filters working: team-filter, season-filter, championship-filter.
